On CI-readiness grounds this disposition is fine — it introduces no code, no regression, and no CI risk; I defer the scope-boundary judgment call itself to the anti-gaming-lens reviewers (O1/F1) who examined it directly, but see no reason to block. No new problems introduced by the doc addenda.
